infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MapRaiders needs your location to track your movement, claim territories, and discover nearby quests and echoes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MapRaiders needs your location to show your position on the map and find nearby content.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MapRaiders uses background location to track your route while walking, running, or cycling.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MapRaiders needs camera access to complete quest verification steps and capture proof.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MapRaiders needs microphone access to record audio echoes and video challenges.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: MapRaiders needs your location to track movement and claim territories.

plugins.cameraPermission: MapRaiders needs camera access for quest verification.

plugins.microphonePermission: MapRaiders needs microphone access to record echoes.
